name: OceanView CI Build
on: [push]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '18'

      - name: Install Frontend Dependencies
        run: |
          cd resort-frontend
          npm install
